content: Supabase remains the strongest default in 2026 for small full-stack SaaS needing auth+Postgres+storage bundled (GoTrue auth, Realtime websockets, S3-compatible Storage, autogenerated REST/GraphQL). Neon is a pure-Postgres alternative (great branching/scale-to-zero) but requires stitching in separate auth/storage providers, adding integration overhead not justified for this MVP. Firebase is NoSQL and mobile-BaaS oriented, a worse fit given relational product/size/price data. Verdict: keep Supabase.
